title.en: Wanhui Church, Baiyue Ancient City Branch.

content.en:
"Wanjiao Society!"

This is a relatively loose organization, but its strength is not weak. There is a strong man in the 26th level of the sky, and there are many strong men above the 20th level, with millions of members.

In the Wanzhong Mountain area, the strength of the Wanjiao Society can be ranked in the top 30.

Other forces are very strict in examining the members who join, but the Wanjiao Society does not examine them much. As long as they are not obviously members of other forces and have some skills, they can join the Wanjiao Society.

This day.

Ye Tian came to a branch of the Wanjiao Society and chose to join the Wanjiao Society.

He showed a little bit of the secret master's means, and his cultivation was not low, so he easily entered the Wanjiao Society.

After that, he refined Chonggong Xuanye for the Wanjiao Society and obtained contribution points. After collecting enough contribution points, he could exchange for the top Chonggong Xuanye secret recipe.

Soon, he showed the level of refining high-level Chonggong Xuanye with a purity of 95%, which attracted the attention of the top leaders of the Wanjiao Society.

Wanhui Church, Baiyue Ancient City Branch.

The Great Deacon Bai Junshan holds the information about Ye Tian in his hand.

"A casual cultivator can actually refine a high-level Chonggong Xuanye with a purity of 95%. This person is not simple."

"However, even if his origin is not simple, our Wanhui Church will still use him!"

"Ye Tian's secret master level is extremely high. Give him the secret recipe of the top-level Chonggong Xuanye Golden Secret Water. If he can refine it with a purity of more than 85%, cultivate him vigorously!" Bai Junshan ordered.

Soon, this order was executed.

...

"Wanhui Church actually gave me the secret recipe of the top-level Chonggong Xuanye Golden Secret Water!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but this was a good thing for him.

Immediately, he began to study the Golden Secret Water.

With his realm of comprehension, he easily studied the Golden Secret Water and then began to refine it.

Of course, he would not show his level of monstrousness directly. Although he succeeded in refining directly, he pretended to fail. After a period of time, he showed that he had refined 70% of the purity, and then gradually improved the purity.

In fact, he quickly refined 100% pure golden secret water, and then improved his magic power.

With 100% pure golden secret water, his cultivation level improved quickly.

The first level of the thirteenth heaven!

The second level of the thirteenth heaven!

The third level of the thirteenth heaven!

Not long after, his cultivation level entered the ninth level of the thirteenth heaven, and he also showed the 95% pure golden secret water.

At the first moment, he was brought to the great deacon Bai Junshan.

"Meet the great deacon¨.¨.!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

He had some understanding of this great deacon. He was a 21st level cultivator, and his strength was not weak. He had condensed an emperor-level palace.

With his current clone's strength, he was naturally no match for this great deacon.

"Ye Tian, ​​you are very good. You can"If you can refine the top-level Chonggong Xuanye to 95% purity, you will be assigned to refine the top-level Chonggong Xuanye of the Wanjiao Church in the future. In addition, your salary will be greatly improved." Bai Junshan said.

"Thank you, Grand Deacon!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Sure enough.

In the days that followed, his status improved a lot. He had enough resources, and the task of refining the top-level Chonggong Xuanye was also very simple for him, and it didn't take long.

In addition, he could also enter the secret book library of the Wanjiao Church and browse many books. Even the ordinary books were much more profound than the books of the master of Zilan Mountain.

If he could browse the entire Wanjiao Church book, he would be confident that he could create the ultimate Chonggong Gong method and the ultimate Chonggong secret method.

But he doesn't have this status yet!

"First, attach yourself to the Wanjiao Church and use the resources of the Wanjiao Church to improve your strength. "Ye Tian said secretly.

In the days that followed, he refined a large amount of top-level Chonggong Xuanye, and his strength became stronger and stronger.

A long time passed.

Ye Tian's cultivation finally entered the realm of the sixteenth heaven, and he perfected the extreme blood armor, extreme blood blade, and extreme blood escape to a level very close to the ultimate Chonggong secret method.

Now, his real combat power should be very close to that of a strong man in the twentieth heaven.

Unfortunately, the top-level Chonggong Xuanye is of little help to him, he must get the Chonggong Jindan Secret recipe.

So one day, he showed that he had refined a top-grade Chonggong Xuanye with 100% purity, which shocked Baijunshan.

Then, he applied to exchange for the secret recipe of Chonggong Jindan. After review, all the top leaders agreed.

Obviously, Ye Tian was too evil, so evil that they all wanted to train Ye Tian and let him refine a large number of Chonggong Jindan.

No matter which force it was, they lacked a secret master who could refine Chonggong Jindan.

So, Ye Tian showed this potential, and they would naturally train him. =Nurture.

In this way, Ye Tian soon obtained a secret recipe for a heavy palace golden elixir, which was called the Nine Dragon Golden Elixir.

After he obtained the secret recipe for the Nine Dragon Golden Elixir, he studied it for a period of time and was able to successfully refine the Nine Dragon Golden Elixir, and the purity reached 90%.

After that, he continued to improve it, and soon he refined a 100% pure Nine Dragon Golden Elixir.

With the 100% pure Nine Dragon Golden Elixir, his cultivation quickly broke through to the seventeenth heaven, and his real combat power was comparable to the twentieth heaven.

In the following years, he kept a low profile. Although he showed more than 70% of the Nine Dragon Golden Pill, he did not continue to produce higher quality Nine Dragon Golden Pills, so the top leaders of the Ten Thousand Churches gradually stopped paying attention to him.

Ye Tian relied on a large number of 100% pure Nine Dragon Golden Pills to continuously increase his cultivation.

Finally, one day, he raised his cultivation to the 20th level, and he hid his cultivation, so that no one in the Ten Thousand Churches knew about it.

With his current combat power, he is enough to rival the strong men of the 24th level.There are not many people who can match him.

(Money)(Money)

But even so, he did not expose himself.

His strength is not worth mentioning in the whole Wanchong Mountain, so he naturally dare not be high-profile.

In the following years, Ye Tian focused on collecting various top-level Chonggong techniques and spent time to create the ultimate Chonggong techniques.

He now mainly understands the Chonggong system thoroughly and creates the ultimate Chonggong techniques with his own experience.

And this takes a long time, but it can be done.

After a long time, Ye Tian collected a large number of Chonggong techniques and transmitted them to his original body.

...

Another time and space line.

The sea of ​​dimensions.

Ye Tian's original body obtained the countless Chonggong secrets, and then began to use the duplicate body here to deduce, so the efficiency of deduction was many times faster.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's cloned body finally deduced the ultimate Chonggong technique. La La.
